posts.author: Summit22 (Cathleen Arnold)
posts.cookedHtml:
Need the ability to embed anything into a monday doc.
Especially

  • List item

Google Docs
other Google Apps
Live videochat stream Google Meet, Zoom, etc

Thank you!

(embed everything barely works for numerous applications in dashboards as it is)

posts.author: DMarken (Danny)
posts.cookedHtml: It is nearly critical for me to be able to embed items into Monday Docs. My employees hate using the “My Work” tab in whatever program we’re in… so In ClickUp, I used to keep all of their items in a doc for just them and organize it by priority. That way, whenever they have to do anything and rattle off what they need to do to anyone else. They can quickly and easily do so. It takes the thought out of their work day and wondering what needs to get done since things can easily get lost in a sea of boards.
